name: Privacy Act 1988
owner: Office of the Australian Information Commissioner (OAIC)
description: Australia's Privacy Act 1988 — federal privacy law containing the Australian Privacy Principles (APPs). Subject to ongoing significant reform via the Privacy Act Review.
relationToCloudSecurity: Applies to cloud-hosted systems within scope.
relationToAISecurity: Applies to AI systems within scope.
